title: TOPDON ArtiDiag600S OBD2 Scanner, Car Diagnostic Tool for Engine Transmission ABS SRS, 9 Service: Oil/Brake/BMS/SAS/DPF/TPMS/ETS Reset/ABS Bleeding/Injector Coding, Lifetime Free Wireless Update
features: 🔥🔥🔥【Upgraded ArtiDiag600S for Peak Performance for Peak Performance】Big Surprise! TOPDON has upgraded the AD600S. With the same cost, you are experiencing faster diagnostics and 70+car brands coverage from 1996-NOW. TOPDON AD600S OBD2 scanner improved Android 11, larger 32G ROM, 5G & 4-Core 1.5 GHz, AD600S scan tool offers ample storage and faster performance, Maximize diagnostic precision with a crystal-clear high-definition 5-inch display, featuring a resolution of 1280x720 for effortless readability of every detail. It supports 15 languages of EN/FR/DE/SP/PT/RU/JP/IT/CH/KR/PO/TK. Worry-free after-sales services enhance your purchase confidence.

【9 Hot Reset Services, Auto VIN】TOPDON ArtiDiag600S enjoy 9 most popular maintenance services(enjoy Lifetime free upgrade) in this scan tool: Oil Reset, Brake Reset，SAS Reset, BMS Reset, ABS BLEEDING, ETS Reset，Injector Coding, DPF Reset and TPMS Reset. ***Please Email us your VIN to Check Compatibility before purchase. Auto-VIN: automatically identify vehicle’s make, model, year information. AutoVIN doesn’t work on ALL cars. Feel free to enter the VIN data manually.

【4 Systems Diagnosis, Data Graphical Display, Data Record & Playback】This TOPDON Car Scanner works for Engine/SRS/ABS/Transmission diagnoses,which is compatible with 67+car brands now and 10,000+ models and enjoy lifetime free update for more features and more compatible car models. It displays live data stream graphically, supports data record&playback and shares report via email for print or troubleshooting. ***DO NOT SUPPORT KEY PROGRAM.***

【Auto-Saved Report, DTC Lookup, Feedback Online】Inspection report records at this code reader automatically saved or manually screenshoted can be shared by e-mail. Find detailed DTCs explanations at DTC LookUP Library or FAQ at "Data" menu. Get Technical Support via support@topdon.com or online feedback. TOPDON offers reliable customer support on Facebook during weekdays. Search “TOPDON Official” on Facebook and contact us via message.

【Touch Screen & Button, One-click WIFI Software Update, Battery Voltage Test】the combination of touch screen and button on this TOPDON OBD2 scanner bring huge convience of operation for car repair work. One click wifi software update save update efforts a lot.NOT a bi-directional diagnostic scanner. Active Test is NOT available.***

【Wide Applicable Crowd】Whether you are a DIYer want to make car repairs yourself instead of paying a mechanic, or a mechanic wants to make repairs and maintenances to grow customer base with improved efficiency, you can count on TOPDON ArtiDiag600.It fits for Technician, advance DIY, garage, car dealer, used car dealer, auto repair shop, automotive engineer, diagnostic tech, truck man, automobile tech, home mechanic, DIY beginner, automotive student, backyard mechanic, retired mechanic.

【Package Contents & NOTE】1. 8 Service Functions do NOT work on all vehicles. Please send VIN(17 digits) to us to check compatibility before purchase. 2. 10 modes of OBD2 Works on most 1996-post OBD II & CAN compliant vehicles 3. systems diagnosis works on vehicles up to 2018, 2019 and some up to 2020.Package Contents: 1x TOPDON ArtiDiag600S OBD2 Scanner; 1 x Protective Case; 1 x Diagnostic Cable; 1 x USB Cable; 1 x User Manual; 1 x Quick Guide.***Does NOT come with power adapter.***

【Worry-free Purchase& Lifetime Free Updates】Choosing TOPDON AD600S diagnostic scanner chooses top-level service. Lifetime free updating steadies your AD600S auto scanner in a newer version. 13 common languages follow your disposal. 24*7 post-sale team offers technical instruction. Try to use the Online Feedback function to obtain better problem solutions.
